name: Cheesecake, Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sugar and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Add eggs; mix until just blended. Do not overmix after adding eggs.
3. Mix graham cracker crumbs with 2 tablespoons sugar.
4. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with cooking spray and sprinkle the crumb mixture over the bottom and sides.
5. Pour the cream cheese mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes or until the center is almost set.
7. Cool and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight. Top with fruit or pie filling if desired.
Notes:
The original Kraft recipe called for 3/4 cup of regular graham cracker crumbs and did not include the sugar mixed with the crumbs. The Kraft version has 164 calories per serving, with 10.6% calories from fat. The modified version has 168 calories per serving, with 8.5% calories from fat.
